'''Clem "Trigger" Vaneer''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Clantaani]] working for [[Longo Two-Guns]]. He earned a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] because he owed the Hutt sixty percent of a generous loan. The bounty was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], who was able to kill him.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
